jgnActs.jgnFactShow: Asserts( $M, 'Do not blame this CA.', $CA, <<$CA, $id, pk(~sk), 'pubKey', ~sn, $i, $j>, $rootCA, $CA, pk(~skCA), 'pubKey-CA', ~sn.1, $i0, $j0>)

Asserts( $rootCA, 'I signed this intermediate CA.', $CA, <$rootCA, $CA, pk(~skCA), 'pubKey-CA', ~sn.1, $i0, $j0>)
